details.test: Task 1: Save up to three mid-level UX Designer jobs in Berlin as favourites
Task 2: Book 45-min tech industry careers coaching in a morning slot next week
Task 3: Add cheapest Interview Skills online group workshop in next 30 days to cart
Task 4: Create weekly Product Manager job alert for London with min salary 90000 GBP
Task 5: Shortlist closer UX job (using Berlin jobs as analogue for Munich Software Engineer task)
Task 6: Calculate and save salary benchmark for Senior Data Analyst in Amsterdam (7 years, Technology)
Task 7: Add two recent career change into tech articles to reading list
Task 8: Set detailed career preferences for Product Manager & Product Owner roles
Task 9: Request cheapest CV review package under $150 with standard turnaround
